title: White & Case, AZB, Sullivan, Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas, Linklaters act on Sun Pharma's $11.75 billion acquisition of Organon
description: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Limited has acquired Organon & Co in an all‑cash deal, valuing Organon at $11.75 billion.The acquisition will be made through Sun Pharmaceutical Holdings a U.S. subsidiary of Sun Pharma.According to the press release, after this deal, Sun Pharma will one of the 25 largest pharma companies in the world with a $12.4 Billion revenue.AZB, Khaitan, Touchstone, Morgan Lewis on India's biggest IPL deal: Aditya Birla-TOI snaps up RCB for ₹16,660 croreAZB & Partners
